programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock: Oops! I Forgot to Cancel Her Plane Ticket; Truth: Found My Sister While Scrolling?
programme.desc: Just two months after Dee and Wayne walked down the aisle, Wayne's girlfriend from the Philippines showed up at their door, and Dee believes he has been living a double life; adopted at a young age, Joy has been on a journey to connect with her biological family, and spotted a woman on social media whom she believes may be her sister.

programme.desc: Brothers clash over funeral expenses for their mother; accusations of defamation ensue.

programme.sub-title: Unlock: The Best Way to Find Out; Truth: Secrets Revealed After Mom's Death
